title: Update Deployment Docs & README
description: Update docs/deployment.md with a new Monitoring & Logging section covering: Loki, Promtail, and Grafana services overview; how to access Grafana (port 3000); log querying with LogQL examples (filter by level, agent_id, request_id, path, status code); retention configuration; and a summary of the pre-built dashboard panels. Update README.md with an Observability section mentioning: structured logging with structlog and JSON output, request correlation IDs via X-Request-ID, Loki + Grafana for log aggregation and querying in production, and the pre-built operational dashboard.
validation: docs/deployment.md contains a Monitoring & Logging section
Deployment docs explain how to access Grafana on port 3000
Deployment docs include at least 3 LogQL query examples
Deployment docs describe log retention configuration
Deployment docs summarize the pre-built dashboard panels
README.md contains an Observability or Logging section
README mentions structlog with JSON output
README mentions Loki + Grafana for production log aggregation
README mentions the pre-built Grafana dashboard
